title: Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
company: Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd!
